evals.prompt: 把这篇文章去一下AI味，中文技术博客
humanize this article but keep section order
humanize 帮我写一篇新文章
expected_behaviors: Clarifies scope or declines blank-page writing

evals.prompt: publish-ready 审校，默认作者声线，去AI味
expected_behaviors: Clarifies this is author-voice writing refine not neutral de-AI only
Does not apply voice-default pipeline unless user chose writing refine
